name: Chocolate-lover's Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs and melted butter in a bowl. Press the mixture firmly onto the bottom and 1 3/4 inches up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until creamy. Gradually add sugar, flour, and salt, stirring into the cream cheese mixture. Add the eggs all at once, beating just until combined. Stir in the melted semisweet chocolate, milk, and vanilla until well mixed.
3. Pour the filling into the crumb-lined pan.
4. Bake in a 325°F oven for 60 minutes or until the center is set. Remove from the oven and let cool for 15 minutes.
5. Loosen the sides of the pan. Cover and chill at least 2 hours.
6. Melt the 1 square semisweet chocolate and butter in a small saucepan over low heat. Drizzle the mixture in a lattice design atop the chilled cheesecake. Chill until the chocolate is set.
